## Summary

Describe the bug, feature request, adapter gap, or maturity task.

## Evidence

Include the smallest useful reproduction, command output, trace shape, or documentation link. Do not include private prompts, credentials, customer data, production logs, or sensitive traces.

## Expected Outcome

Describe the observable result that would make this issue complete.
